description: Style NoteMinimalist styling peppered with innovative design details, we love wearable timepieces by QnQ! Styled to perfection, this watch is the perfect accessory staple you've been looking for. Liven up the summer with this watch from QnQ!  Product DetailsCase style:  Stainless steel square case with crystal embellishmentsDial style: Orange dial with metallic hands and branding displayed on the dialStrap style: Orange genuine leather strap with a tang claspFeatures: Screw to reset time  Water ResistantWarranty: 1 yearSizeCase diameter: 35 mm Case thickness: 5 mm
